title: AI Engineer
description: AI Engineers integrate artificial intelligence capabilities and machine learning models into practical software applications. They focus on fine-tuning models, building pipelines, using foundation models, and deploying smart solutions.

topics.name: Advanced Python & Shell Scripting
topics.description: Build high proficiency in Python programming: generators, decorators, object-oriented concepts, and basic shell navigation.

topics.name: Mathematics for Machine Learning
topics.description: Master probability, probability distributions, matrix multiplication, gradients, and optimization.
resources: Mathematics for Machine Learning (Imperial College / Coursera)

topics.name: Data Wrangling & Visualization
topics.description: Learn to load, manipulate, filter, and visualize datasets with Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Seaborn.

topics.name: Machine Learning Algorithms
topics.description: Implement linear regression, decision trees, random forests, SVMs, and clustering using Scikit-Learn.
resources: Hands-On Machine Learning (Book by Aurélien Géron)

topics.name: Model Evaluation & Tuning
topics.description: Learn metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, ROC-AUC. Master hyperparameter optimization (GridSearch, Optuna).

topics.name: Version Control for Data (DVC)
topics.description: Learn version control principles for dataset files, models, and ML pipelines, extending Git.

topics.name: Deep Learning with PyTorch
topics.description: Understand multi-layer perceptrons, backpropagation, CNNs for computer vision, and RNNs/LSTMs.
resources: fast.ai Course (Practical Deep Learning for Coders)

topics.name: Transformers & HuggingFace
topics.description: Learn the attention mechanism, Transformer architecture, and how to use HuggingFace Transformers for NLP/Vision.
resources: Attention Is All You Need Paper

topics.name: Transfer Learning & Fine-Tuning
topics.description: Adapt pre-trained models to specific domains or custom datasets using fine-tuning techniques.

topics.name: LLMs, Prompts & Vector Databases
topics.description: Understand LLM architectures. Learn vector embeddings, prompt engineering, and vector databases like Pinecone or Chroma.

topics.name: Orchestration (LangChain / LlamaIndex)
topics.description: Build pipelines using LangChain or LlamaIndex to connect LLMs with custom data sources (RAG - Retrieval Augmented Generation).

topics.name: Model Deployment (FastAPI, Docker)
topics.description: Serve your AI models as lightweight APIs using FastAPI, package the application in a Docker container, and host it.
